params.name: Relativity Scripts

params.description: On Oct 13, 1916 AD, Einstein published his manuscripts on the Theory of Relativity. Previously, due to Newton's Laws, there was an issue in the theory of special relativity. So Einstein proposed the theory of general relativity. The most famous aspect of special relativity is the mass-energy equation, which states that mass increases with energy. It also explains the enormous amount of energy released by nuclear reactions, which, however, is not what lead to the birth of the atom bomb. The gravi …
